headline: AFL Q1 Deep Dive: Missed Expectations as Japan Sales Offset by Premium Pressure
summary: Supplemental insurance provider Aflac (NYSE:AFL) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales falling 1.8% year on year to $4.24 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.75 per share was 2.5% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
